basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has released the official Research Associate II Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate II Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics specializing in Open Quantum Systems, Quantum Optics, and/ or Ultracold Atomic Physics are eligible to apply online on or before 12-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with specialization in Open Quantum Systems, Quantum Optics, and/or Ultracold atomic physics
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with specialization in Open Quantum Systems, Quantum Optics, and/or Ultracold atomic physics

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications online is 12th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-II position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics with a specialization in Open Quantum Systems, Quantum Optics, and/or Ultracold atomic physics to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 65,880/- per month for the Research Associate-II position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate-II position in the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-II jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Research Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate-II position is a contractual role. The duration of the contract will be as per the institute's policy and project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Gujarat, but it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific state-related requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What should I do if I face issues while applying online?
faq.answer: If you encounter any technical difficulties during the online application process, it is recommended to contact the IIT Gandhinagar recruitment cell or the designated technical support as mentioned in the official notification.
